title: Interactive Exercise
description:
Create a shape hierarchy demonstrating polymorphism:
- Shape base class with area() and perimeter()
- Circle, Rectangle, Triangle classes that override methods
- A function that calculates total area of any shapes
instructions:
Create a shape hierarchy demonstrating polymorphism:
- Shape base class with area() and perimeter()
- Circle, Rectangle, Triangle classes that override methods
- A function that calculates total area of any shapes

hints.text: Define a base Shape class with area() and perimeter() methods. Override these in each shape subclass. Create a polymorphic function that works with any shape.

commonMistakes.consequence: Base class implementation used instead of specific one
commonMistakes.correction: Override area() and perimeter() in each shape class

commonMistakes.mistake: Checking types instead of using polymorphism
commonMistakes.consequence: Code breaks when adding new shapes
commonMistakes.correction: Call methods directly without type checking
